Package cloudpage.scan

package cloudpage.scan
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    cloudpage
     
  • Class
    Description
    ClamAvVirusScanner
    VirusScanner backed by a ClamAV clamd daemon using the INSTREAM command.
    FileScanResult
    Result of scanning a single file.
    ScanJob
    Mutable state of a single asynchronous folder scan, owned by one user.
    ScanStatus
    Lifecycle state of an asynchronous folder scan job.
    ScanVerdict
    Outcome of scanning a single file.
    VirusScanConfig
    Wires the virus-scan configuration properties and the background executor that runs scans.
    VirusScanner
    Abstraction over a virus-scanning engine.
    VirusScanner.ScanResult
    Verdict for a single file, with an optional threat name when infected.
    VirusScanProperties
    Configuration for the folder virus-scan feature.
    VirusScanService
    Runs asynchronous virus scans over a user's folder.
